population: Players with >= 100 RB total snaps, min 6 games

stat_labels.ryoe_per_att_z: Rush yards over expected per attempt

rush_yards_z.what: Total raw rushing yards (full season, REG only).
rush_yards_z.how: From nflverse load_player_stats(summary_level='week') summed per (player, team).

rush_tds_z.how: From nflverse load_player_stats — correctly attributed even on lateral plays.

carries_z.how: From nflverse load_player_stats per (player, team) stint.
carries_z.limits: Pure opportunity — not a skill measure.

rec_yards_z.limits: Volume stat. Pass-catching role drives this.

yards_per_carry_z.limits: Inflated by long runs; one or two big gains can spike a low-volume back.

rush_success_rate_z.what: Percentage of rushes that produced a successful play by EPA standards.
rush_success_rate_z.how: Mean of nflverse binary success flag across this player's carries (per stint).
rush_success_rate_z.limits: Binary cutoff; doesn't differentiate near-misses from runaway successes.

snap_share_z.what: Fraction of estimated team offensive snaps the player was on the field for.
snap_share_z.how: off_snaps / (games_played * 65). 65 is an approximate league-average snap count per offensive game.
snap_share_z.limits: Uses a constant denominator; teams with low- or high-snap offenses are normalized away.

targets_per_game_z.limits: Role-driven; pass-catching backs vs. early-down only.

explosive_run_rate_z.how: PBP plays gaining ≥10 yards / total carries.
explosive_run_rate_z.limits: Often scheme-aided; low-volume backs have noisy rates.

explosive_15_rate_z.how: Same as above with a 15-yard cutoff.

rz_carry_share_z.what: Share of the player's carries that came inside the opponent's 20.
rz_carry_share_z.limits: Usage signal: trust in scoring position.

goal_line_td_rate_z.what: TD rate on carries inside the 5.
goal_line_td_rate_z.limits: Tiny samples — extreme values for backs with few goal-line carries.

short_yardage_conv_rate_z.limits: Small samples; counted as a first down only when the run gained one.

yac_per_reception_z.what: Average yards after the catch per reception.
yac_per_reception_z.limits: Credit shared with scheme and blockers.

broken_tackles_per_att_z.how: PFR data: broken tackles total / PFR carries.
broken_tackles_per_att_z.limits: Subjective tracking by PFR; methodology can drift.

yards_before_contact_per_att_z.what: Yards gained before being contacted, per attempt.
yards_before_contact_per_att_z.how: PFR data: yards before contact / PFR carries.
yards_before_contact_per_att_z.limits: More about offensive line + scheme than the runner.

yards_after_contact_per_att_z.what: Yards gained after first contact, per attempt.
yards_after_contact_per_att_z.how: PFR data: yards after contact / PFR carries.
yards_after_contact_per_att_z.limits: Best single-stat playmaker measure for RBs.

epa_per_rush_z.how: Mean of nflverse EPA on this player's carries (per stint).
epa_per_rush_z.limits: Depends on trusting the EPA model.

rec_epa_per_target_z.what: Expected Points Added per target on receiving plays.
rec_epa_per_target_z.how: Mean of nflverse EPA on the player's targets (per stint).

ryoe_per_att_z.what: Rush Yards Over Expected per attempt.
ryoe_per_att_z.how: NFL Next Gen Stats: actual rush yards − model-expected, per attempt.
ryoe_per_att_z.limits: Requires NGS tracking data; older seasons missing or partial.
